summary: A WPBF 25 News (West Palm Beach) local TV news package ('25 WPBF NEWS', 'GOVERNMENT SHUTDOWN' banner, 'FINANCIAL STRAIN MOUNTS FOR TSA OFFICERS' chyron) featuring interviews with AFGE Local 558 union reps about TSA officers missing paychecks, plus airport security-checkpoint and traveler-line B-roll. It is a recorded broadcast news segment, not an agency-produced music-driven video, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: FINANCIAL STRAIN MOUNTS FOR TSA OFFICERS; GOVERNMENT SHUTDOWN; 25 WPBF NEWS; J. Jarvis WPBF 25 News
